content.content: export function useToast(): { toasts: string[]; addToast: (message: string) => void; } { const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<string[]>([]); const addToast = (message: string) => { setToasts((prevToasts) => [message, ...prevToasts.slice(0, 4)]); }; useEffect(() => { const timer = setTimeout(() => { setToasts((prevToasts) => prevToasts.slice(1)); }, 5000); return () => clearTimeout(timer); }, [toasts]); return { toasts, addToast }; }
